calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Natalie Lupo for Betty Wong (Petitioner).

The Court stated that is has no problem with respect to the real property, but it has a problem with ordering that the personal property is community property with an allegation in the petition that it is joint tenancy property. Ms. Lupo stated that they have been in contact with all of the Brokers, that they are in the process of transferring over the shares and that if the Court does not grant the petition with respect to the personal property, they will need to find another way and may do an 850 petition. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property as to the real property and denied the petition as to the personal property (subject to the order being reviewed and modified).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court observed that there were notice issues and a failure to submit a proposed order of which the petitioner had been advised by the tentative ruling in the matter, and as there was no one present in court on the matter, the Petition for Spousal Property was ordered off calendar.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
